caribbean.headline: Roatan Weather: 26 kt Winds, 6.4 ft Seas Expected
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing northeasterly swell with seas to 6.4 ft, sustained winds near 26 kt and an 8 s swell period, with a 50% rain probability. I expect Small Craft Advisory conditions across the western Caribbean around Roatan and advise securing small vessels into Roatan and nearby ports; St. Lucia remains lighter with winds near 12 kt.

mediterranean.headline: Lisbon Rain Focus, Mykonos Breezy
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing light northerly winds of 10 kt with 2.6 ft seas and a 7 s WNW swell, and there is 75% rain probability. I advise port operators to prepare for heavy rain impacts to cargo handling and reduced visibility, and I note Mykonos will be breezier with winds near 20 kt affecting small-boat operations.
